'''SoroSuub Stimchew''' was a sweet [[Foodstuff/Legends|snack]] manufactured by [[SoroSuub Corporation/Legends|SoroSuub Corporation]]. The treat was used by [[Pilot/Legends|pilots]] to keep awake on long flights. The [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] [[Quist (pirate)|Quist]] always carried a supply of SoroSuub Stimchew and was perpetually found to be chewing it and leaving the wrappers wherever he had been.<ref name="TM-CA3" />

==Behind the scenes==
Initially, the product was known simply as "SoroSuub Chew" in the first edition printing of ''[[Tatooine Manhunt]]'',<ref name="TM">''[[Tatooine Manhunt]]''</ref> but the named was changed to SoruSuub Stimchew with the release of the second edition printing of the adventure, which was included in ''[[Classic Adventures: Volume Three]]''.<ref name="TM-CA3" />
